title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Cognizant

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Cognizant
jsonLd.description:
Cognizant has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Visakhapatnam office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Cognizant:
Cognizant is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cognizant!
